hooks.command: printf '{"systemMessage":"Design-stage repository: read CLAUDE.md and docs/specs/* before implementation. Current source of truth lives in docs/specs/. No build, test, or formatter commands exist yet."}'

printf '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PostToolUse","additionalContext":"After file edits in this repository, keep docs/specs and CLAUDE.md aligned when repository-level guidance changes. Avoid assuming build/test/format commands exist until they are explicitly added."}}'
